rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Find Binary Searching for Executables with Setuid or Setguid Bit (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Find Binary Searching for Executables with Setuid or Setguid Bit (RedCanary
  Threat Detection Report)
id: 1312409d-9cf1-43c4-82dd-25f5ef59283c
status: experimental
description: "Detects search for setuid or setgid binaries. This rule looks specifically\
  \ for execution of the find \nbinary searching for executables with the setuid or\
  \ setgid bit set. Part of the RedCanary 2023 \nThreat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/setuid-setgid/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.privilege_escalation
- attack.t1548.001
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: linux
detection:
  selection_1:
    Image|contains: find
  selection_2:
    CommandLine|contains: -perm
  selection_3:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - '4000'
    - '2000'
    - u=s
    - g=s
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
